title: Hot Pot Opening & Soups
items: Turn on the lights and the fan
Turn ON the boiler and electric pan
Put all rubbish bin in place
put all dry clean containers away
1 container with water and detergent for dirty cutlery
switch on deep fry and rice cooker
add water and switch on miso soup pot
bone soup 26 cm, turn on fire
take the master bowl, add bone soup (took before) into the bowl and 1 bag signature seasoning. Then mix together and put back to the signature pot
add 2 container signature base into basket, add some soup from signature pot, then mix it and put into the signature pot
stir the soup after 15 minutes during 1 hour
The soup left over in the cool room need to check before serve (use it first)
All of things should be completed at 3:30 pm (Mon, Tuesday) or 11am (Wednesday to Sunday)
Start to top up the ingredients ready to open
